description: Interact with Forgejo/Codeberg repositories via the REST API

evals.prompt: How do I authenticate with the Codeberg API?
How do I read a file from a Codeberg repository?
evals.expected_output: File content retrieval from Forgejo/Codeberg repo
assertions: Shows error handling for missing files

evals.prompt: How do I create a pull request on Codeberg?
evals.expected_output: Pull request creation with title, description, and branch refs
assertions: Mentions head and base branch refs

evals.prompt: How do I manage issues via the Codeberg API?
evals.expected_output: Issue operations: create, list, close, comment

evals.prompt: How do I interact with Codeberg Actions CI/CD workflows?
evals.expected_output: CI workflow triggering and status monitoring
